title: NHSE ICB COPD Digital Technology Fund
closing_date_note: Confirm current application window and deadline with NHS England.
description: NHS England funding to support ICBs in commissioning digital COPD technology. Clinitouch explicitly named as eligible technology. Other HTE19 apps — confirm eligibility with NHSE.
notes: Spirit Health can support ICBs in applying. Contact clinitouch@spirit-health.com. Confirm current wave criteria and deadlines with NHS England.

title: Digital Health Technology Catalyst
sponsoring_body: National Institute for Health and Care Research (NIHR)
description: NIHR-managed competitive funding programme supporting the evaluation and adoption of digital health technologies for respiratory and chronic lung conditions. Grants are available for NHS organisations and academic partners to conduct real-world evaluations, implementation studies, and health economic analyses of digital therapeutics that address unmet need in respiratory pathways. The programme prioritises technologies with existing evidence of efficacy that require further evaluation to support NHS adoption at scale.
notes: Confirm current call details, eligibility, and collaboration requirements with NIHR and your local research and development office.

title: NHS Innovation Fund for Long-term Conditions
description: NHS England programme funding the adoption and spread of proven digital health innovations for people living with long-term conditions. The fund supports ICBs and provider collaboratives to implement digital therapeutics and remote monitoring technologies that have demonstrated clinical effectiveness and can reduce unplanned hospital admissions, improve patient self-management, and deliver measurable improvements in population health outcomes.
notes: Align bids with ICB long-term conditions and digital strategies; confirm wave criteria and match funding with NHS England and your Health Innovation Network.

title: SBRI Healthcare / NHS Accelerated Access Collaborative
description: SBRI Healthcare funds NHS-embedded innovation contracts. Luscii holds an SBRI Phase 2 contract. Future SBRI calls may be relevant to other DTx in this catalogue.
notes: SBRI contracts typically involve NHS organisations co-developing and testing innovations. Check current open competitions.

title: Health Innovation Network adoption support
closing_date_note: Ongoing — contact your regional Health Innovation Network.
description: Regional teams across England support adoption of NICE-endorsed innovations. Contact your local Health Innovation Network for implementation support and to ask whether any adoption funding or facilitation is available for your system.
notes: Contact your regional Health Innovation Network for current support offers relevant to DTx adoption in your area.

title: NIHR Invention for Innovation (i4i) programme
sponsoring_body: National Institute for Health and Care Research (NIHR)
description: NIHR i4i funds the development and evaluation of medical devices and digital health technologies. May be relevant to commissioners wishing to co-fund evidence generation for HTE19 technologies or for early-stage DTx evaluation.
notes: NIHR is one of several funding routes — not the only option. Check all routes listed in this directory.
